title: Hire through the Global Skills Strategy: Dedicated Service Channel - Canada.ca
content:
## Dedicated Service Channel
We offer enhanced customer service through the Dedicated Service Channel (DSC) for
- employers who make a significant investment in Canada
- universities that support publicly funded research chair holders coming to Canada
The DSC gives you (the employer) access to an account manager who can
- answer your questions
To be eligible for the DSC, your company must be identified and referred by one of our referral partners.
- If you’re eligible, the DSC will contact you.
- If you want to learn more about referral partners and process, or the Global Skills Strategy in general, email us at promotion@cic.gc.ca .
The DSC doesn’t process applications or offer special exemptions from the Labour Market Impact Assessment (LMIA) process.

The Quebec Ministère de l’Immigration, de la Francisation et de l’Intégration (MIFI) (available in French only) designates referral partners for the province of Quebec. Employers can find a list of MIFI-designated partners (available in French only) on the MIFI website. Quebec-based companies can use MIFI-designated referral partners or federal partners (listed below).
- Business Development Bank of Canada
- Canada Economic Development for Quebec Regions
- Global Affairs Canada – Trade Commissioner Service
- Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada – Accelerated Growth Service
- National Research Council – Industrial Research Assistance Program
